stem: Line m is parallel to line n, and a transversal line t intersects both. Two exterior angles on the same side of the transversal are formed. One measures 42° and the other measures x°. What is the value of x?
rationale: Choice B is correct. Same-side exterior angles formed by a transversal cutting two parallel lines are supplementary. Thus x + 42 = 180, so x = 138.
